title: Ukoku's Chapter / Genjō Sanzō's Chapter
overview: See priest Ukoku's rise to the position of Sanzō.  Also, see Kōryū's childhood under Kōmyō Sanzō and his appointment to the position of Genjō Sanzō.

title: Son Goku's Chapter
overview: See Son Goku's imprisonment atop Mount Gogyō and his first meeting with Genjō Sanzo.

title: Gojyo and Hakkai's Chapter / Epilogue
overview: See Gojyo and Hakkai's first meeting and how they came to be roommates.
